Suppress Dusk of Amber entities in 'Easy' and 'Hard' difficulties from the Dusk of Amber Ordeal.

Earn various rewards by clearing these missions.
Complete Suppression after defeating a BongBong [Orange] unit in a single Encounter
Complete Suppression after defeating a BongBong [Orange] unit in a single Encounter
Complete Suppression after defeating a BunBun [Juicy Squeezer - Orange] unit in a single Encounter
Complete Suppression without BongBong [Orange] unit retreating
Complete Suppression after the Welfare Team Captain defeats 5+ enemies in a single Encounter
Complete Suppression with the Welfare Team Captain surviving and taking less than 5 hits from enemy Attack Skills
Complete Suppression after the Welfare Team Captain defeats at least 1 BunBun [Juicy Squeezer - Orange] in a single Encounter
Complete Suppression after 3+ allies each gain BongBong Orange at least once
Complete Suppression after dealing 300+ Damage with a single Attack Skill in a single Encounter
Complete Suppression without any ally deaths
Complete Suppression without any of the allies' SP dropping to -45 SP
Complete Suppression without any of the allies reaching 10 Bleed Potency
Complete Suppression after defeating a BongBong [Orange] unit in a single Encounter
Complete Suppression after defeating a BongBong [Orange] unit in a single Encounter
Complete Suppression after defeating a BunBun [Juicy Squeezer - Orange] unit in a single Encounter
Complete Suppression after defeating a BunBun [Juicy Squeezer - Orange] unit in a single Encounter
Complete Suppression without BunBun [Juicy Squeezer - Orange] unit retreating
Complete Suppression after the Welfare Team Captain defeats at least 1 BunBun [Juicy Squeezer - Orange] in a single Encounter
Complete Suppression after the Welfare Team Captain defeats 10+ enemies in a single Encounter
Complete Suppression with the Welfare Team Captain surviving and taking less than 3 hits from enemy Attack Skills
Complete Suppression after defeating 3+ enemies with a single Attack Skill
Complete Suppression after all allies each gain Bongbong Orange at least once
Complete Suppression after dealing 500+ Damage with a single Attack Skill in a single Encounter
Complete Suppression without any ally deaths
Complete Suppression without any of the allies' SP dropping to -45 SP
Complete Suppression without any of the allies reaching 10 Bleed Potency
Complete all Missions in both Easy and Hard difficulties
The 8th Walpurgis Night - The Dusk of Amber
The 8th Walpurgis Night - The Dusk of Amber
[The 8th Walpurgis Night - The Dusk of Amber] unlocks regardless of your progress in the Main Story. Enter via the event banner on the Window and the Drive tabs.
Event Period
The duration of The 8th Walpurgis Night event is shown here. During the event, complete Missions for Easy and Hard difficulty event Encounters and claim their rewards.
Easy Difficulty Encounter

Select the door to begin the Easy difficulty Encounter.
During the 8th Walpurgis Night Event period, the Encounter consumes an Enkephalin Module upon entry. 
On Easy difficulty, any Deployed Identities under Level 60 will be raised to Level 60.
Also, any Deployed Identities and E.G.O under Tier 3 Uptie/Threadspinning Level will be raised to Tier 3 Uptie Level.
Hard Difficulty Encounter
Clearing the Easy difficulty Encounter unlocks the Hard difficulty. In Hard difficulty, your Identities' current Levels, Uptie Tiers, and E.G.O Threadspinning Tiers will be reflected.
Welfare Team Captain Effects

The #1 Sinner to be deployed in the Teams menu will be imbued with the 'Welfare Team Captain' effect. The Sinner with the 'Welfare Team Captain' effect will gain more Slots and other beneficial effects.
Missions
You can enter the [Missions] page, where you can view the list of Missions to be completed during the Encounter and their rewards.
You can view the Reward Exchange period in the [Missions] page.
Easy difficulty and Hard difficulty each has different sets of Missions to complete.
Complete these Missions and claim various rewards from the [Missions] page.

Even after the event fully ends, you will be able to experience the 'The 8th Walpurgis Night - The Dusk of Amber' combat Encounters and view its story anytime on the Drive tab or Theater - [Detour Tales].
